description_long: This object is a grouped set of urban traffic control devices, primarily featuring multiple orange traffic cones with gray reflective bands, as well as several striped barricades and warning lights. The cones are conical with wide, hexagonal or square black bases for stability, and the reflective bands are positioned horizontally around the upper section. The barricades are rectangular with diagonal red and white stripes, mounted on heavy black bases, and some are connected by yellow-and-black striped plastic chains. Several cones and barricades are topped with amber warning lights, and a coiled orange cable is visible among the cones. The surfaces of the cones and barricades appear to be made of durable plastic, with some parts showing slight scuffing or dirt, indicating outdoor use. No logos or text markings are visible on any of the components.
description: A collection of orange traffic cones, striped barricades, and warning lights, all with reflective bands and sturdy black bases, arranged as a typical urban road barrier set.
description_view_0: This view shows the cones and barricades from a side angle, highlighting the arrangement of cones, the coiled cable, and the attached warning lights.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the full lineup of cones, barricades, and warning lights, with the striped faces of the barricades most visible.
description_view_2: A rear-side view focusing on the cones and the back of the barricades, with the coiled cable and warning lights visible from behind.
description_view_3: A back view showing the reverse of the barricades and cones, with the bases and the tops of the warning lights clearly visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Each cone has two horizontal gray reflective stripes near the top, approximately 5 cm wide. Barricades have diagonal red and white reflective stripes covering their front faces.
attribute_tip_design: The tips of the cones are rounded and solid orange, some topped with amber warning lights. Barricade tops are flat and may have attached lights or chain connectors.
attribute_base_design: The bases are wide, hexagonal or square, black, and made of heavy rubber or plastic for stability, with a textured surface for grip.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on any part of the object.
attribute_condition: The objects appear lightly used, with minor scuffing and some dirt, but no significant damage or fading.
